name: Mixpanel
description: Mixpanel is a product analytics platform for tracking user interactions. Analyze events, user flows, funnels, retention, and cohorts to understand how people use your product.

capabilities.name: track_event
capabilities.description: Track a user event with properties for product analytics.

capabilities.name: query_insights
capabilities.description: Query insights data with event segmentation and filtering.

capabilities.name: get_funnel
capabilities.description: Analyze a conversion funnel with multiple steps.

capabilities.name: get_retention
capabilities.description: Get user retention data over time periods.

capabilities.name: query_users
capabilities.description: Query user profiles with property filters.

capabilities.name: set_user_profile
capabilities.description: Create or update a user profile with properties.
